授業目的: To develop oral communication skills for a variety of common situations
到達目標: By the end of the course, participants will be better able to *express their ideas on a range of common and interesting topics*communicate effectively in a number of transactional scenarios*interact in various social and group work scenarios*comprehend both natural and graded listening tasks *improve ability to use and comprehend selected pronunciation features, including weak forms, prominence and word stress
授業方法: Classes will be interactive and group-work based, with some language and skills guidance from the teacher. Learners are expected to participate actively in all tasks to gain the maximum benefit to their spoken English skills. There will be a range of spoken tasks, including group discussions, mini presentations, supported by reading & listening tasks. Materials will include a selection from the textbook as well as additional materials distributed in class and on LUNA.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
